name: HadSST4-SST
citation: Kennedy, J. J., Rayner, N. A., Atkinson, C. P., and Killick, R. E. (2019). An ensemble data set of sea-surface temperature change from 1850: the Met Office Hadley Centre HadSST.4.0.0.0 data set. Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres, 124, 7719-7763. https://doi.org/10.1029/2018JD029867.
Sandford, C., and Rayner, N. (2026). Addressing the World War 2 Warm Anomaly in HadSST.4.2.0.0. International Journal of Climatology. https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.70388.
data_citation: Met Office Hadley Centre. HadSST.4.2.0.0 sea-surface temperature dataset. https://www.metoffice.gov.uk/hadobs/hadsst4/.
acknowledgement: HadSST.4.2.0.0 data were obtained from http://www.metoffice.gov.uk/hadobs/hadsst4 and are Crown Copyright, Met Office, provided under an Open Government Licence v3.
notes: The required formatted SST output uses HadSST.4.2.0.0_monthly_GLOBE.csv as the active source and annualizes monthly values with arithmetic means. The annual global CSV is retained as a validation source.
